## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and design rationale.

## Validation

- [ ] ShellCheck passes
- [ ] JSON validation passes
- [ ] Tested in a clean or representative Arch environment
- [ ] Install, repeat install, and restore behavior considered
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated
- [ ] No configuration or assets copied from existing dotfiles projects

## Screenshots

Include before/after images for visual changes and remove private information.
